socialProof.weekLine: {{count}} people updated their portfolio this week

weeklyRecap.defaultHeadline: Your AI-powered weekly recap is ready

weeklyRecapScreen.title: Weekly Recap
weeklyRecapScreen.emptyDesc: Not enough data this week. Try again later.

monthlyWrappedScreen.emptyDesc: Your Wrapped appears once you have enough activity.

sharedWatchlist.title: Shared list
sharedWatchlist.expiredDesc: Ask the owner for a fresh link.

slide1.headline: Quiet Luxury. Smarter Portfolio.
slide1.body: A golden pulse of live prices and AI insights — track your portfolio with calm, premium focus.

slide2.headline: Signal, Not Noise
slide2.body: Proven data sources across crypto, forex and metals with flash updates and a real-time sentiment gradient.

slide3.headline: Your Personal Coach
slide3.body: AI suggestions and smart alerts accelerate your decisions. Your portfolio is active within 10 minutes.

consent.headline: Your security, first
consent.body: Please review the Terms and the GDPR/KVKK notice before you continue.
consent.terms: I have read and accept the Terms of Service.
consent.privacy: I accept the GDPR/KVKK privacy notice.
consent.disclaimer: This app does not provide investment advice. Prices are informational only.

quoteMeta.title: Data source
quoteMeta.a11yOpen: Show data source and last update time
quoteMeta.disclaimer: Prices are aggregated from third-party providers and shown for informational purposes only. Not investment advice.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security by linking an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy). A 6-digit code is required on sign-in.
twoFactor.enrollBody: Open your authenticator app and add a new account. Enter the secret below or scan the QR code from your browser.
twoFactor.disableBody: Confirm your password and a current TOTP code to remove two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Match the system theme or pin the app mode.

dashboard.benchmarkNeedTx: Add at least one cost-basis transaction to unlock benchmark.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Once you add your first buy/sell transaction, real returns, risk and AI guidance become available.
dashboard.loadingAssetsDesc: Total value is ready, positions are still loading. Refresh to continue.
dashboard.wrappedDesc: See what you did this month — and what to improve — in one tap.

marketsScreen.title: Discover
marketsScreen.searchEmpty: No results found. Change search or category.
marketsScreen.errorRefreshHint: {{error}} Tap this banner to refresh market feed.

portfolioScreen.title: My Portfolio
portfolioScreen.emptyDesc: After your first transaction, returns, cost basis and AI insight are calculated automatically.
portfolioScreen.loadErrorTitle: Portfolio data could not be loaded
portfolioScreen.partialValuation: Valuation is partial: {{missing}} missing prices, {{stale}} stale prices.
portfolioScreen.sandboxDesc: Test strategies without real money. Same prices, zero risk.

profileScreen.title: Profile
profileScreen.watchlistSync: Favorites sync with server while logged in.
profileScreen.pushDesc: Notify when price alert triggers (Expo push)
profileScreen.twoFactorDisabled: Add an authenticator app for extra security
profileScreen.exportUnavailableDesc: File system is not available in this environment.

alertsScreen.title: Price Alerts
alertsScreen.errorHint: {{error}} Pull down to refresh and try again.
alertsScreen.emptyDesc: Create a price or percentage change alert so you do not miss opportunities.

alertHistory.title: Alert History
alertHistory.errorHint: {{error}} Refresh the page and try again.
alertHistory.emptyDesc: Triggered alerts will be listed on this screen in chronological order.

watchlistScreen.title: My Watchlist
watchlistScreen.emptyDesc: Add relevant assets to favorites to track price movements from one screen.
watchlistScreen.shareBody: Sharing my {{count}} favorite assets on MarketPulse with you: {{url}}

insightsScreen.title: AI Insights
insightsScreen.heroDesc: Data-driven summaries and next-step suggestions for your portfolio, watchlist, and markets.
insightsScreen.errorHint: {{error}} Close this notice and generate again.
insightsScreen.generating: Generating a new insight, keeping current cards visible...
insightsScreen.emptyDesc: Tap the refresh icon above to create your first AI summary.
insightsScreen.defaultDisclaimer: AI summaries are for informational purposes only; not investment advice.

strategyHub.title: Investment Coach
strategyHub.loadError: Strategy hub could not be loaded. Please try again.
strategyHub.actionError: Action could not be applied. Try again.
strategyHub.goalValidation: Enter title, amount, and date for the goal.
strategyHub.goalSaveError: Goal could not be saved. Check inputs and try again.
strategyHub.snapshotError: Share link could not be created. Try again.

addTx.title: Add Transaction
addTx.behavioralDesc: High-value sell detected. A 5-second pause is recommended to reduce panic-selling risk.
addTx.unsavedDesc: There are unsaved fields in the form. Do you want to leave?
addTx.resetDesc: All fields will be cleared. Are you sure?
addTx.notePlaceholder: e.g. weekly buy, limit order filled...

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password
editProfile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters. Please try again with a stronger password.
editProfile.passwordMismatch: Passwords do not match. Check the confirmation field.
editProfile.saveError: Profile could not be saved. Check the info and try again.

compareScreen.title: Asset Comparison
compareScreen.desc: Track relative performance of two assets in the same period on one chart.
compareScreen.loadError: Comparison could not be loaded. Check symbols and try again.
compareScreen.emptyDesc: Not enough data for selected symbols in this range. Try a different symbol or range.

fifoScreen.title: FIFO Summary
fifoScreen.disclaimer: FIFO sell matching summary (informational only). Get accountant confirmation before filing.
fifoScreen.loadError: FIFO summary could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
fifoScreen.emptyDesc: Selected portfolio needs transaction history for FIFO summary. Add a transaction and try again.

compare.title: Compare assets
compare.subtitle: Normalized to 100 at the start of the range.

intelligence.dashboardPrimerMeta: Tap for live AI signals across BTC, gold, USDTRY and 12+ assets
intelligence.heroHint: Personalised macro signal appears here once data is ready.
